title: Selection and responsibility
doc_html:
§3004. Selection and responsibility

            The school counselors and counseling directors shall be selected by and be responsible to the local school officials in each city, parish, or other local public school system.

            Added by Acts 1962, No. 319, §4; Acts 2021, No. 275, §4.
doc_text:
§3004.  Selection and responsibility
The school counselors and counseling directors shall be selected by and be
responsible to the local school officials in each city, parish, or other local public school
system.
Added by Acts 1962, No. 319, §4; Acts 2021, No. 275, §4.
